productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Blue Printed T-shirt
description: Composition Blue v-neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and print across the chest Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron on decorations Subtle and stylish, this blue t-shirt from united colors of benetton speaks volumes of your sense of heightened style. The print across your chest is tuned in to your passion for soccer, while the short sleeves contour your well-toned arms perfectly. Team this with jeans and lifestyle sportswear for that cool, casual look. Model statistics The product is a size XL on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
